Priya Nair
Frontend Engineer

WORK HISTORY
Frontend Engineer, Brightloop Media (2020 - Present)
  - Built React/TypeScript single-page applications for a media streaming product.
  - Owned the design system and component library used across 5 product teams.

UI Engineer, Studio Kestrel (2017 - 2020)
  - Developed responsive web interfaces using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

EDUCATION
B.A. Design, Coastal Arts College (2013 - 2017)

SKILLS
JavaScript, React, TypeScript, CSS, HTML, Figma, Accessibility
